catalog.purpose: Scratchpad metadata for distro hopping and ready-to-boot VM profiles.

distro_candidates.name: CachyOS
distro_candidates.use_case: Performance-tuned Arch derivative for daily desktop use.
distro_candidates.notes: Already present as a full install profile.

distro_candidates.name: Fedora Workstation
distro_candidates.use_case: Good baseline for modern GNOME, Wayland, and upstream defaults.
distro_candidates.notes: Also paired with Fedora Xfce, Cinnamon, and Server variants.

distro_candidates.name: Debian
distro_candidates.use_case: Conservative baseline to compare stability and package freshness tradeoffs.
distro_candidates.notes: Includes both live GNOME and lean netinst profiles.

distro_candidates.name: Ubuntu
distro_candidates.use_case: Mainstream desktop/server baseline with broad hardware support.
distro_candidates.notes: Includes both desktop and server profiles.

distro_candidates.name: Linux Mint
distro_candidates.use_case: Traditional desktop workflow with lower setup friction.
distro_candidates.notes: Left as catalog-only until you choose a preferred mirror.

distro_candidates.name: openSUSE Tumbleweed
distro_candidates.use_case: Rolling distro with strong tooling and snapshots.
distro_candidates.notes: Includes both KDE live and net installer profiles.

distro_candidates.name: EndeavourOS
distro_candidates.use_case: Closer-to-Arch experience with a quicker install path.
distro_candidates.notes: Titan ISO profile with two official mirror candidates.

distro_candidates.name: Pop!_OS
distro_candidates.use_case: COSMIC desktop and Ubuntu-derived workstation baseline.
distro_candidates.notes: Generic AMD/Intel ISO profile; NVIDIA ISO can be added separately if needed.

distro_candidates.name: KDE neon
distro_candidates.use_case: Latest released KDE software on a stable Ubuntu base.
distro_candidates.notes: Tracks the User Edition current ISO.

distro_candidates.name: Void Linux
distro_candidates.use_case: Independent distro with XBPS and runit for non-systemd comparison.
distro_candidates.notes: Uses the glibc Xfce live installer image.

distro_candidates.name: openSUSE Slowroll
distro_candidates.use_case: Slower rolling openSUSE baseline between Leap-style stability and Tumbleweed cadence.
distro_candidates.notes: Uses the current Slowroll DVD media alias.

distro_candidates.name: NixOS
distro_candidates.use_case: Declarative system management and reproducible configuration.
distro_candidates.notes: Includes graphical and minimal installer profiles.

distro_candidates.name: Arch Linux
distro_candidates.use_case: Clean rolling baseline without derivative defaults.
distro_candidates.notes: Useful as a plain Arch control sample alongside CachyOS.

distro_candidates.name: Alpine Linux
distro_candidates.use_case: Tiny guest for smoke tests, rescue tasks, and quick boot checks.
distro_candidates.notes: Already present as the lightweight validation guest.
